title: Demonic Turtle reflects prevented damage

card.rawText: If this card has a lower SPD stat than your opponent's primary creature, reduce all Atk damage this card receives by 1/2. Inflict the reduced damage back on the attacking creature.

plan.title: Demonic Turtle reflects prevented damage
plan.summary: After reducing Atk damage, verify Demonic Turtle inflicts the reduced amount back on the attacking creature.

notes: Place Demonic Turtle as player_1 primary creature and run a deterministic battle.

steps: Run battle where Demonic Turtle reduces damage.
